ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_engagement" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "recorder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recorder who entered the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the engagement occurred */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district associated with the engagement */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster involved in the engagement */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the community program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the engagement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the engagement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program */,
  "budget_allocated" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "impact_score" TEXT /* A score indicating the impact of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_recorder_id FOREIGN KEY ("recorder_id") REFERENCES recorders ("recorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_engagement_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recorders" (
  "recorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recorder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the recorder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recorder */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the recorder belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the recorder */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the recorder joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recorder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_size" TEXT /* Area size in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region this district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "major_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district this cluster belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the cluster */,
  "major_issues" TEXT /* Major issues faced by the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community engagement record */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the participant */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the participant */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "recorder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recorder */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., full, limited) */,
  "access_start_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_end_date" TEXT /* Date when access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_recorder_id FOREIGN KEY ("recorder_id") REFERENCES recorders ("recorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of the constraint (e.g. regex) */,
  "constraint_message" TEXT /* Message explaining the constraint */,
  "constraint_regex" TEXT /* Regex pattern for the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance setting */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field in the form */,
  "appearance_type" TEXT /* Type of appearance (e.g., text, dropdown) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hints" (
  "hint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hint */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field associated with the hint */,
  "hint_text" TEXT /* Text of the hint */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example input for the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field for which the calculation is relevant */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method of calculation if applicable */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used for the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id")
)
